---
title: "Monkeypox Data Explorer"
description: "Visualizing the data produced by the World Health Organization on the 2022 monkeypox outbreak."
image: featured.png 
categories:
  - Flexdashboard
---


```{=html}
<iframe width="780" height="500" src="https://hossainlab.github.io/monkeypox/" title="Webpage example"></iframe>
```


```{=html}
<a href="https://hossainlab.github.io/monkeypox/" class="btn btn-primary rounded-pill me-2">Live Dashboard</a>
```
